prestazioni: Replace the stock 2.5L inline-6 (engine code: CP74) with a fully built CP74 featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.5:1 compression), Cunningham conrods, and a billet crankshaft from Racetorations Ltd. for 300+ hp reliability

Install a custom-fabricated ITG Maxogen cold air intake with a K&N RC-1006 filter and a custom 3-inch stainless steel velocity stack to optimize airflow for the CP74’s single Zenith-Stromberg 175 CDSE carburetor setup, paired with a Mallory Unilite distributor for precise ignition timing

Upgrade to a Quaife ATB differential (TR6-specific 3.45:1 ratio) with a custom 4.10:1 ring & pinion set from Rimmer Bros., paired with a Tilton Engineering twin-plate clutch and a Getrag 265 5-speed overdrive transmission conversion
estetica: Fit a full carbon fiber widebody kit from JAE (Japan Auto Elements), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom ducktail spoiler, all finished in matte British Racing Green with gold pinstriping

Replace the stock steel bumpers with a custom aluminum front splitter and rear diffuser from Racetorations Ltd., paired with a set of 15x8-inch Minilite-style wheels (ET15 offset) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (205/60R15 front, 225/60R15 rear)

Install a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (UK) with a bolt-in design, finished in gloss black powder coat, paired with Recaro SRD bucket seats upholstered in Connolly leather with contrasting red stitching and Schroth 4-point harnesses
